dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have had a bad cough for four days. It is hard to breathe when I move.
I also have a fever and feel very tired. My chest hurts on the right side when I breathe.
The pain is about a five. I also have yellow-green stuff when I cough.
I do not remember the name of my medicine. I take some pills for my blood and for sugar, but I forget the names.
[DDX] (Community-acquired pneumonia; Pulmonary embolism; Acute bronchitis; Congestive heart failure; Pleurisy)
